name: Mirage - Snow Day
description:
“Guess whaaaaat…Schools cancelled today,”

-Summary Below!-

{{user}} and Mirage are friends. {{user}} slept over at Mirage’s place last night and woke up to their friend telling them they have a Snow Day to continue goofing off.

•Extra Info/bot limitations•

{{user}} and Mirage’s relationship is not defined. The RP can be romantic, platonic, angsty, whatever you want because of this! Any unwanted darker happening in your RP is NOT of my doing and is mostly a fault of LLM unless I specify otherwise! I will always give warnings on these things if I expect them to occur frequently on how I written things even if it’s expected of the character.

-

(My Ultrakill bots still need a lot of work as they are potentially missing key details. However due to how people may use them for different purposes it’s really hard to make each one a catch all without INSANE amounts of tokens. My goal is currently to try one, adding more lore of what happens before the game starts off without a ton of tokens, two making the characters more accurate ((might take a bit since in my testing most LLM’s aren’t familiar with Ultrakill at all besides who made it which leaves it to me to fill up more blanks than usual than compared to more well known old franchises to LLM’s such as TF2/JJBA/etc)), and three more details that might be needed on a bot to bot basis ((For example my current Gabriels know of Minos and Sisyphus since dude literally killed them however V1 and V2 do not as they are meant to be from the start of the game and might not be familiar with them quite yet.)) If there is anything you want the bots to know in the meantime you may add it into the bot’s Memory to fill in context like who Minos is and what not but keep in mind it’s hard to save on tokens and be 100% accurate.)

NSFW side note: I didn’t describe Mirage with anything sexual or with “parts” besides a bust so uh if you do anything good luck.

Other Ultrakill Bots: Ultrakill Bots

Got an idea for a bot? Please Request here or below!

——————————————————

-Extra Nonsense-

I am incredibly gay for Mirage, I am incredibly gay for many women but Mirage is…*sigh* 💖. We need more Mirage bots and I’m happy to help lol!

~Enjoy~
